structured.name: Set DisplayMessage for Transaction
structured.objective:
To enable a CSO to display messages during an ongoing transaction on a Charging Station that
are not build in to the firmware.
structured.description:
This use case describes how a CSO can set a message to be displayed on a Charging Station for
a specific transaction. Depending on the given parameters the message shall be displayed a
certain way on the Charging Station.
scenario:
1. The CSO configures the CSMS to send a request to show a new message during a given
transaction.

2. The CSMS sends a SetDisplayMessageRequest message with the transactionId to the
Charging Station.

3. The Charging Station accepts the request by sending a SetDisplayMessageResponse message
to the CSMS.
4. The Charging Station shows the new message on the display while the transaction is ongoing.
structured.prerequisites: No messages configured with the same IDs.
structured.postconditions:
The new message will be displayed on the Charging Station while the transaction is ongoing
(time, duration and position depend on configuration)
structured.remarks:
The maximum number of messages that can be stored in a Charging Station can be read by the
CSMS in the Configuration Variable:NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a Message
object via a SetDisplayMessageRequest and the
transactionId of the message is not known by
the Charging Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
UnknownTransaction.

requirements.precondition:
When the transaction with the given
transactionId ends
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL remove the message from the list
of messages.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfo object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedPriority.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfo object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the state of the
message is not supported by the Charging
Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedState.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfo object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the format of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedMessageFormat.

The Charging Station SHALL NOT display the DisplayMessage
message before the startTime.

The Charging Station SHALL remove a DisplayMessage
message after the endTime.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station knows the language
preferences of the EV Driver
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL display the DisplayMessage
message in the preferred language, if available.

When no matching language is available, it is RECOMMENDED to
show a DisplayMessage message in English as fall-back, if
available.

The Charging Station SHALL store the messages in persistent
storage, so they survive a power cycle/reboot of the Charging
Station.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the total
number of messages after having handled this
request will exceed
NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL respond with status: Rejected.

Language SHALL be specified as RFC-5646 tags, see: [RFC5646],
example: US English is: "en-US"

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is NormalCycle
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show this message in the normal
cycle of messages.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is InFront
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of the normal cycle of
messages.

requirements.precondition:
When multiple messages with priority InFront
are configured to be shown at the same time
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL cycle these messages.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is AlwaysFront
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of other installed messaged.
Hence, it shall not cycle it with other messages and the Charging
Station’s own message shall not override this message.

requirements.precondition:
O02.FR.17 AND
Another message with priority AlwaysFront is
already set
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL replace the old message with the
newly set message.

chunks.content:
# O02 - Set DisplayMessage for Transaction

**Objective:** To enable a CSO to display messages during an ongoing transaction on a Charging Station that
are not build in to the firmware.

**Description:** This use case describes how a CSO can set a message to be displayed on a Charging Station for
a specific transaction. Depending on the given parameters the message shall be displayed a
certain way on the Charging Station.

**Actors:** CSO, CSMS, Charging Station

**Scenario:**
1. The CSO configures the CSMS to send a request to show a new message during a given
transaction.
2. The CSMS sends a SetDisplayMessageRequest message with the transactionId to the
Charging Station.
3. The Charging Station accepts the request by sending a SetDisplayMessageResponse message
to the CSMS.
4. The Charging Station shows the new message on the display while the transaction is ongoing.

**Prerequisites:** No messages configured with the same IDs.

**Postconditions:** The new message will be displayed on the Charging Station while the transaction is ongoing
(time, duration and position depend on configuration)

**Remarks:** The maximum number of messages that can be stored in a Charging Station can be read by the
CSMS in the Configuration Variable:NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.

# O02 - Requirements

**O02.FR.01**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a Message
object via a SetDisplayMessageRequest and the
transactionId of the message is not known by
the Charging Station
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
UnknownTransaction.

**O02.FR.02**
Precondition: When the transaction with the given
transactionId ends
The Charging Station SHALL remove the message from the list
of messages.

**O02.FR.03**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfo object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedPriority.

**O02.FR.04**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfo object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the state of the
message is not supported by the Charging
Station
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedState.

**O02.FR.05**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
MessageInfo object via a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the format of
the message is not supported by the Charging
Station
The Charging Station SHALL send a
SetDisplayMessageResponse with status:
NotSupportedMessageFormat.

**O02.FR.06**
The Charging Station SHALL NOT display the DisplayMessage
message before the startTime.

**O02.FR.07**
The Charging Station SHALL remove a DisplayMessage
message after the endTime.

**O02.FR.08**
Precondition: When the Charging Station knows the language
preferences of the EV Driver
The Charging Station SHALL display the DisplayMessage
message in the preferred language, if available.

**O02.FR.09**
Precondition: O02.FR.08
When no matching language is available, it is RECOMMENDED to
show a DisplayMessage message in English as fall-back, if
available.

**O02.FR.10**
The Charging Station SHALL store the messages in persistent
storage, so they survive a power cycle/reboot of the Charging
Station.

**O02.FR.11**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the total
number of messages after having handled this
request will exceed
NumberOfDisplayMessages.maxLimit.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with status: Rejected.

**O02.FR.12**
Language SHALL be specified as RFC-5646 tags, see: [RFC5646],
example: US English is: "en-US"

# O02 - Requirements (continued)

**O02.FR.14**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is NormalCycle
The Charging Station SHALL show this message in the normal
cycle of messages.

**O02.FR.15**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is InFront
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of the normal cycle of
messages.

**O02.FR.16**
Precondition: When multiple messages with priority InFront
are configured to be shown at the same time
The Charging Station SHALL cycle these messages.

**O02.FR.17**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
SetDisplayMessageRequest and the priority of
the message is AlwaysFront
The Charging Station SHALL show this message at the
configured moment, regardless of other installed messaged.
Hence, it shall not cycle it with other messages and the Charging
Station’s own message shall not override this message.

**O02.FR.18**
Precondition: O02.FR.17 AND
Another message with priority AlwaysFront is
already set
The Charging Station SHALL replace the old message with the
newly set message.
